title: callista pandurifera
intro: Callista pandurifera, also known as the 'butterfly orchid', is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The roots of the Callista pandurifera plant contain a compound called panduratin A, which possesses anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential candidate for medicinal use. The health benefits of Callista pandurifera include its ability to reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of certain bacteria, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of various diseases. Callista pandurifera can be prepared into herbal extracts or infusions for use in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and applications.
